body_txt: A cool board is a skateboard, surfboard, snowboard, Hover Board , etc. that is either really cool, or used by a really cool character. The board can be used as transportation, a weapon, a Plot Device , or simply to show that the user is cool. Some cool boards are cool only because of the cool character who rides it, but others are magical, rocket-powered, or weaponized in some way. Cool boards are sometimes subject to Rule of Cool , because a rocket-powered skateboard wouldn't work that way, the rider couldn't realistically skate that well, or some other reason. See also Sky Surfing and Shield Surfing .
